calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Action Pursuant To California Code Of Civil Procedure Section 581(F)(2); Request For Entry Of Judgment; Declaration Of Ryan T. Moore (And Exhibits Attached Thereto)
Off Calendar Jun-25-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT LYFT, INC.'s Motion To Dismiss Action Pursuant To California Code Of Civil Procedure Section 581(F)(2); Request For Entry Of Judgment.

Lyft, Inc.'s unopposed motion to dismiss action per CCP 581(f)(2) is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)

DEMURRER
Off Calendar May-07-2024 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. MICHAEL PARKER, Esq. of Smith, Smith and Feeley LLP (tel: 949-263-5920) for Respondent North Light Specialty Inssurance Company.
Atty. MARTIN ALPEREN, Esq. of Tyson & Mendes LLP (tel: 628-253-5070) for Respondent United States Fire Insurance Company.
Atty. RYAN MOORE, Esq. of Fox Rothschild LLP (tel: 424-285-7127) for Respondent Lyft, Inc.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT LYFT, INC.'s DEMURRER.

Matter discussed. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Lyft, Inc.'s unopposed demurrer is sustained with leave to amend.

Order signed.
